sql.if: and if(recomStatus > 0, '人审通过', if(recomStatus < 0, '人审不通过', '人审等待')) = #{recStatus}

mapper.sql:
with posts as (
), (select groupBitmapOrState(forbid_post_bitmap) from lofter.tag_fetch_tag_status_dd where dt=#{yesterday} ) as forbid_post_bitmap, (select groupBitmapOrState(gift_post_bitmap) from lofter.tag_fetch_post_status_dd where dt=#{yesterday}) as gift_post_bitmap, post_period_data as ( select a.postId, sum(shua_hot) shua_hot, sum(commend_count) as commend_count, sum(hot) as hot, sum(praise_count) as praise_count, sum(reproduce_count) as reproduce_count, sum(recommend_count) as recommend_count, sum(subscribe_count) as subscribe_count, bitmapCardinality(groupBitmapOrState(free_gift_sender_bitmap)) as free_gift_uv, bitmapCardinality(groupBitmapOrState(pay_gift_sender_bitmap)) as pay_gift_uv, sum(free_gift_pv) as free_gift_pv, sum(pay_gift_money_amount) as pay_gift_money_amount, sum(exposed_count) as exposed_count, sum(click_count) as click_count, sum(rec_exposed_count) as rec_exposed_count, sum(feed_rec_exposed_count) as feed_rec_exposed_count, sum(tag_rec_exposed_count) as tag_rec_exposed_count, sum(cold_start_rec_exposed_count) as cold_start_rec_exposed_count from lofter.tag_fetch_post_di a join posts d on a.postId = d.postId where dt <= #{endDate} and dt >= #{startDate} group by a.postId )
